framework.name: Visa Human-in-the-Loop Confirmation (Not Autonomous)
framework.description: Visa's architecture explicitly requires human confirmation before payment — request_purchase_confirmation then confirm_purchase. This is NOT autonomous agent payment. It's agent-assisted with human gate, fundamentally different from Mastercard's Verifiable Intent which enables autonomous agent spending within pre-authorized bounds.
framework.raw_quote: Before proceeding with payment, the agent requests human confirmation where the user sets clear parameters and permits the agent to spend on their behalf

source.title: Introducing Visa Intelligent Commerce on AWS: Enabling agentic commerce with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Artificial Intelligence
